# Fun Lovin Tattoo

Professional tattoo artistry with decades of experience, offering both a boutique studio environment and elite mobile services.

## Core Information
- **Location**: Mexborough, United Kingdom (Mexborough Studio).
- **Mobile Services**: UK-wide and Global brand activations, weddings, and private events.
- **Artists**: A collective of professional artists specializing in fine-line, illustrative, and bespoke custom works.
- **Established**: 2007.

## Services
- **Bespoke Studio Sessions**: Specialized illustrative works in mexborough.
- **Wedding Tattoos**: Professional mobile setup for live tattooing at weddings.
- **Corporate Activations**: High-engagement brand experiences and pop-up studios.
- **Private Events**: Exclusive mobile artistry for parties and gatherings.

## Pricing Highlights
- **Studio sessions**: Ranging from small custom works to full-day sessions.
- **Mobile packages**: Bespoke proposals for half-day, full-day, and multi-day events.
- **Addons**: Numbing treatments, custom flash design, and venue-specific setup options.

## Contact & Booking
- **Website**: https://flt.ahm-labs.com
- **Booking**: https://flt.ahm-labs.com/book
- **Location Status**: Managed via site settings for real-time mobile availability.

## FAQ Quick Links
Detailed answers to pain, pricing, aftercare, and scheduling are available on the home page.
